useCasesPage.title: Search for every product and team
useCasesPage.description: From e-commerce storefronts to internal tools — AACsearch adapts to your data model and your team's scale.

useCases.title: Built for your use case
useCases.subtitle: One API, many shapes. Bring your data — AACsearch handles the indexing, ranking, and delivery.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce product search
ecommerce.description: Faceted filters, synonym expansion, zero-results handling, and per-user scoped tokens — all in a single search call.

helpCenter.title: Help center & docs
helpCenter.description: Index your knowledge base and surface relevant articles in milliseconds. Pair with the Knowledge module for Q&A over PDFs.

multiTenant.title: Multi-tenant SaaS
multiTenant.description: One AACsearch index per tenant, scoped tokens per end-user. Your customers never see each other's data — by design.

devTools.title: Developer tools
devTools.description: Semantic search over code, configs, and logs. MCP Server lets your AI agents search and update indexes programmatically.

internalTools.title: Internal tools
internalTools.description: Fast search over CRM records, inventory, employee directories, or any internal dataset your team queries daily.

contentSites.title: Content sites
contentSites.description: Instant search for blogs, changelogs, and documentation. The Browser SDK drops into any front end in under an hour.

useCasesEcommercePage.title: Search for e-commerce
useCasesEcommercePage.description: Faceted filters, synonym expansion, zero-results handling, and real-time analytics — built for product catalogs.

useCasesEcommerce.title: Product search that converts
useCasesEcommerce.subtitle: Connect your catalog with the PrestaShop or Bitrix module. Live in an afternoon. Analytics from day one.

facetedFilter.title: Faceted filtering
facetedFilter.description: Brand, category, price range, availability, attributes — any field in your schema becomes a facet. No extra config.

synonyms.title: Synonym expansion
synonyms.description: Add synonyms in the dashboard. TV → television, sofa → couch. Users find products with natural language.

zeroResults.title: Zero-results handling
zeroResults.description: AACsearch tracks every no-result query. Use the list to add synonyms, products, or fallback suggestions.

prestaShop.title: PrestaShop module
prestaShop.description: Drop-in PHP module. Syncs on every product save, update, and delete. Full catalog export with one click.

analytics.title: Conversion analytics
analytics.description: Track CTR per query, top search terms, and filter usage. Identify ranking issues before they hurt revenue.

widget.title: Drop-in widget
widget.description: 14KB widget for your storefront. No build step, no npm. Works alongside your existing theme.

useCasesSaasPage.title: Search for multi-tenant SaaS
useCasesSaasPage.description: One AACsearch index per tenant, scoped tokens per end-user. Your customers never see each other's data.

useCasesSaas.title: Search isolation built in
useCasesSaas.subtitle: Tenant isolation is architectural — not just policy. Each org gets its own index, its own quota, its own keys.

tenantIsolation.title: Per-tenant indexes
tenantIsolation.description: Create one index per customer organization. Data never mingles. Deleting a tenant deletes their index.

scopedTokens.title: Per-user scoped tokens
scopedTokens.description: Issue tokens server-side that lock to a userId filter. Your end-users search only their own records.

multiIndex.title: Multi-index per tenant
multiIndex.description: Up to 10 indexes per org on Pro. Products, orders, tickets, docs — separate indexes, one dashboard.

quota.title: Per-tenant quota
quota.description: Track search-unit consumption per tenant. Attribute costs to customers. Bill accordingly.

orpc.title: oRPC management API
orpc.description: Programmatically create indexes, rotate keys, and pull analytics per tenant from your backend.

reindex.title: Schema evolution
reindex.description: Evolve your data model without downtime. Reindex each tenant in the background, swap aliases atomically.

useCasesHelpCenterPage.title: Search for help centers & docs
useCasesHelpCenterPage.description: Index your knowledge base and surface relevant articles in milliseconds. Pair with the Knowledge module for AI Q&A.

useCasesHelpCenter.title: Help users help themselves
useCasesHelpCenter.subtitle: Instant article search, zero-results tracking, and AI Q&A over PDFs — one integration, no search engineer required.

articleSearch.title: Instant article search
articleSearch.description: Full-text search over your help articles with typo tolerance and ranking by relevance. Results in under 50ms.

knowledgeRag.title: AI Q&A (RAG)
knowledgeRag.description: Users ask a question in natural language. The Knowledge module retrieves relevant chunks and generates a cited answer.

zeroResults.title: Zero-results intelligence
zeroResults.description: Every unanswered query is logged. Surface gaps in your documentation before customers escalate to support.

multilingual.title: Multilingual support
multilingual.description: Index content in multiple languages. Search in the user's locale. Synonym libraries per language.

widget.title: Drop-in search widget
widget.description: Add search to any help center in under an hour. Works on Docusaurus, GitBook, Notion, or custom portals.

analytics.title: Search analytics
analytics.description: Top queries, zero-results, and CTR show you what users actually look for — not what you think they do.

useCasesDevToolsPage.title: Search for developer tools
useCasesDevToolsPage.description: Semantic search over code, configs, and logs. MCP Server lets AI agents search and update indexes programmatically.

useCasesDevTools.title: Search built for developers
useCasesDevTools.subtitle: REST API, typed SDK, MCP Server, and an oRPC control plane. No GUI required — automate everything.

restApi.title: Full REST API
restApi.description: 15 endpoints, OpenAPI 3.1 spec, API key auth. Integrate from any language, any CI pipeline, any infra.

mcp.title: MCP Server for AI agents
mcp.description: Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client can search, list indexes, upsert documents, and pull stats programmatically.

semanticSearch.title: Semantic search
semanticSearch.description: OpenAI embeddings over code comments, configs, and logs. Find relevant entries even with different terminology.

typedSdk.title: Typed browser SDK
typedSdk.description: NPM package with full TypeScript types. Integrate in your dev tool's front end without guessing API shapes.

orpcControl.title: Programmatic control plane
orpcControl.description: Create indexes, rotate keys, trigger reindex, and pull analytics from your build pipeline or deployment scripts.

useCasesContentSitesPage.title: Search for content sites
useCasesContentSitesPage.description: Instant search for blogs, changelogs, and documentation. The Browser SDK drops into any front end in under an hour.

useCasesContentSites.title: Content search that keeps readers
useCasesContentSites.subtitle: Blog posts, changelogs, documentation, landing pages — indexed and searchable from day one.

contentIndexing.title: Index anything
contentIndexing.description: MDX, Markdown, HTML, JSON feeds — any content format that produces structured records can be indexed.

instantSearch.title: Instant search UI
instantSearch.description: Results appear as the user types. Typo tolerance, highlight matching text, deep-link to anchor sections.

browserSdk.title: Browser SDK
browserSdk.description: Drop the typed SDK into your Next.js, Astro, Nuxt, or static site. One component, instant results.

changelog.title: Changelog search
changelog.description: Developers search changelogs to find when a behaviour changed. Index changelog entries and let them find it in seconds.

multilingual.title: Multilingual content
multilingual.description: Index content per locale. Serve results in the user's language. Synonym libraries tuned per locale.

seo.title: SEO-friendly
seo.description: Search is client-side — no server rendering required. Your static pages stay statically generated.

solutionsPage.title: Industry Solutions
solutionsPage.description: AACsearch powers search for retail, media, fintech, education, healthcare, and gaming platforms worldwide.

solutions.title: Search built for your industry
solutions.subtitle: From product catalogues to clinical terminology, AACsearch adapts to the data model your team already uses.

retail.title: Retail & E-commerce
retail.description: Product search with facets, synonyms, and instant filtering. Boosts, pin rules, and in-session merchandising included.

media.title: Media & Publishing
media.description: Full-text search over articles, tags, authors, and multimedia metadata. Multi-language support and relevance tuning out of the box.

fintech.title: Financial Services
fintech.description: Tenant-isolated search with audit log, per-key origin allow-lists, and encrypted index. GDPR and CCPA ready.

education.title: Education & EdTech
education.description: Course, lesson, and instructor search. Synonym libraries for academic terms, multi-language UI, and accessibility-first widget.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: HIPAA-ready search architecture. Clinical synonym dictionaries, audit trail, and role-based data access controls.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.description: Player profiles, item catalogues, and leaderboard search. Real-time index updates, geo search, and sub-50ms latency at any scale.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce search
ecommerce.description: Product search with typo tolerance, faceted navigation, instant results, and multi-currency support. Built for catalogues of any size.

enterprise.title: Enterprise search
enterprise.description: Secure, scalable search for the enterprise. SSO, audit logs, SLA guarantees, and dedicated support. Deploy in your region or globally.

saas.title: SaaS search
saas.description: Search that integrates into your SaaS product. Scoped tokens for tenant isolation, usage-based billing, and white-label options.

solutionsRetailPage.title: Search for Retail & E-Commerce
solutionsRetailPage.description: Shoppers find what they want faster. Store teams control results without code. Seamless sync with your product catalog.

solutionsRetail.title: Search that converts
solutionsRetail.subtitle: Every feature a retail team needs — product search, navigation, merchandising, and analytics — in one hosted platform.

productSearch.title: Product search
productSearch.description: Instant, typo-tolerant product search. Customers find the right item even when they misspell it or use synonyms.

filterNavigation.title: Faceted navigation
filterNavigation.description: Dynamic facets for category, brand, price, colour, and size. Counts update in real time as filters are applied.

synonyms.title: Retail synonyms
synonyms.description: Manage 'sofa / couch', 'trainers / sneakers' and hundreds of retail synonym pairs. One CSV import, instant effect.

inventory.title: Real-time inventory
inventory.description: Ingest product stock updates within seconds. Sold-out items are demoted automatically based on your availability field.

merchandising.title: Merchandising rules
merchandising.description: Pin promoted products to the top, exclude discontinued items, and boost seasonal lines — no code deploy required.

analytics.title: Retail analytics
analytics.description: Zero-result rate, top queries, click-through rate, and conversion funnel — all segmented by collection and locale.

facets.title: Product facets
facets.description: Multi-select facets for size, color, brand, price range, rating, and custom attributes. Real-time facet counts updated with every query.

instantSearch.title: Instant search
instantSearch.description: As-you-type search with typo tolerance. Results appear from the first keystroke, with debounced queries and client-side caching for a snappy UX.

multiCurrency.title: Multi-currency search
multiCurrency.description: Display prices in the shoppers local currency. AACsearch handles multi-currency indexing with per-currency faceted price ranges.

catalog.title: Catalog search
catalog.description: Search across product catalogs by title, description, SKU, brand, and category. Typo-tolerant with faceted filtering.

filters.title: Advanced filters
filters.description: Price sliders, category trees, brand selectors, rating filters, and custom attribute selectors. All facet counts update in real time.

merch.title: Merchandising
merch.description: Boost promoted products, pin bestsellers, and schedule seasonal placements. Curation rules let merchandisers override algorithmic results.

solutionsMediaPage.title: Search for Media & Publishing
solutionsMediaPage.description: Surface the right article, video, or podcast the moment readers ask. Multi-language support and real-time content sync included.

solutionsMedia.title: Discovery at editorial speed
solutionsMedia.subtitle: Publish a new piece and it appears in search within seconds. Tag it, and readers find it across every surface of your platform.

contentSearch.title: Full-text content search
contentSearch.description: Search across headlines, body copy, tags, author bios, and captions. Highlight matching excerpts in results.

tagging.title: Tag & category facets
tagging.description: Filter by topic, format, date, author, or content type. Nested facets support complex editorial taxonomies.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language search
multiLanguage.description: Run separate indexes per language or a single multi-language index. Locale-aware synonym management included.

realTimeSync.title: Real-time CMS sync
realTimeSync.description: Webhook-driven sync from Contentful, Strapi, WordPress, or Sanity. Published articles appear in search in under a second.

fullText.title: Long-form relevance
fullText.description: Configurable field weights favour headlines over body copy. Boost recency for news, or depth for evergreen guides.

analytics.title: Content analytics
analytics.description: See which queries have no results, which topics trend, and which articles get discovered through search vs direct links.

articles.title: Article search
articles.description: Search across thousands of articles by headline, author, category, publication date, and keyword. Typo-tolerant and facet-supported for news and editorial sites.

multiformat.title: Multi-format search
multiformat.description: Index articles, videos, podcasts, and image galleries. Search across all content formats from a single search box with type-specific filters.

recommendations.title: Content recommendations
recommendations.description: Surface related articles and content using vector search for semantic similarity. Increase page views and reader engagement with AI-powered recommendations.

subscription.title: Subscription-gated search
subscription.description: Combine search with subscription gating. Free users see preview results; subscribers access full content. Scoped tokens enforce access policies per query.

trending.title: Trending content
trending.description: Surface trending articles based on recency, popularity, and editorial weight. Time-decay ranking keeps stale content out of top results.

video.title: Video search
video.description: Search across video titles, descriptions, transcripts, and tags. Facet by category, duration, publish date, and content type.

categories.title: Category navigation
categories.description: Hierarchical category navigation for media sites. Browse by topic, region, content type, and publication date with real-time counts.

content.title: Content discovery
content.description: Help readers discover content across your media properties. Semantic search and recommendations increase page views and engagement.

freshness.title: Freshness ranking
freshness.description: Time-decay ranking ensures the newest content surfaces first. Configurable decay curve for news, blogs, and evergreen content.

multilingual.title: Multilingual media
multilingual.description: Index and search content in multiple languages. Language-aware stemming, tokenization, and stopword handling per locale.

solutionsFintechPage.title: Search for Financial Services
solutionsFintechPage.description: Tenant-isolated, auditable search for financial data. GDPR, CCPA, and SOC 2-aligned from the start.

solutionsFintech.title: Compliant search, without the complexity
solutionsFintech.subtitle: AACsearch gives financial teams the performance of modern search with the access controls and audit trail compliance requires.

tenantIsolation.title: Strict tenant isolation
tenantIsolation.description: Every API call carries an org-scoped token. Cross-tenant reads are rejected at the protocol level — no application-layer gate required.

auditLog.title: Audit trail
auditLog.description: Every search query, document ingest, and admin operation is logged with timestamp, actor, and org context.

accessControls.title: Scoped access controls
accessControls.description: Issue read-only search tokens scoped to specific collections, date ranges, or field filters. Tokens are HMAC-signed and short-lived.

encryption.title: Encryption at rest & in transit
encryption.description: All data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Key management handled by your cloud provider.

gdpr.title: GDPR & CCPA ready
gdpr.description: Field-level deletion and pseudonymisation. Right-to-be-forgotten requests resolved at the index level within minutes.

performance.title: Sub-50ms at scale
performance.description: High-frequency financial data indexed in real time. P99 search latency stays under 50ms at any transaction volume.

auditLogs.title: Audit log search
auditLogs.description: Search millions of audit log entries by user, action, resource, and timestamp. Investigate compliance incidents in seconds instead of hours.

compliance.title: Compliance search
compliance.description: Search across KYC documents, transaction records, and regulatory filings. Boolean queries, date ranges, and filtered searches for compliance teams.

regions.title: Multi-region search
regions.description: Deploy AACsearch across multiple regions for data residency compliance. Each region operates independently with isolated search infrastructure.

transactions.title: Transaction search
transactions.description: Search transaction history by amount, currency, merchant, date range, and status. Sub-50ms latency even across millions of transactions.

precision.title: High-precision search
precision.description: Financial search demands precision. AACsearch delivers exact matches for account numbers, transaction IDs, and legal entity identifiers.

security.title: Enterprise security
security.description: Encryption at rest and in transit, audit logging, RBAC, and IP allowlisting. SOC2-aligned security controls for financial applications.

speed.title: Sub-50ms speed
speed.description: Financial traders and analysts need sub-50ms search. AACsearch delivers consistent low-latency results even during market volatility.

solutionsEducationPage.title: Search for Education & EdTech
solutionsEducationPage.description: Help learners discover courses, lessons, and instructors instantly. Multi-language support and accessible search widget included.

solutionsEducation.title: Learning starts with discovery
solutionsEducation.subtitle: AACsearch adapts to your learning platform — whether you index courses, lessons, instructors, or study materials.

courseSearch.title: Course & lesson search
courseSearch.description: Instant search across titles, descriptions, learning objectives, and instructor names. Typo-tolerant for learner queries.

learningPaths.title: Structured navigation
learningPaths.description: Faceted search by subject, level, format, duration, and certification. Nested categories map to your curriculum structure.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language content
multiLanguage.description: Index content in 50+ languages. Language-aware stemming and separate synonym libraries per locale.

accessibility.title: Accessible search widget
accessibility.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant widget. Keyboard navigation, screen reader labels, and sufficient colour contrast built in.

synonyms.title: Academic synonyms
synonyms.description: Map discipline-specific terms: 'ML / machine learning', 'JS / JavaScript'. Import from CSV or manage in the dashboard.

analytics.title: Learning analytics
analytics.description: Discover which topics learners search most, where they find no results, and which queries lead to enrollment.

catalog.title: Course catalog search
catalog.description: Help students find courses across departments, levels, and formats. Filter by subject, instructor, schedule, and credit type.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base search
knowledge.description: Index research papers, theses, and academic publications. Full-text and semantic search across your institution knowledge repository.

multilingual.title: Multilingual education
multilingual.description: Support search across multiple languages for international universities. Each language indexed independently with language-aware stemming.

scorm.title: SCORM content search
scorm.description: Index SCORM learning objects and e-learning modules. Search across course titles, descriptions, learning objectives, and module metadata.

access.title: Access control
access.description: Role-based access controls for educational search. Students, faculty, and administrators see different content based on permissions.

courses.title: Course search
courses.description: Search across course catalogs by subject, schedule, instructor, and credit type. Real-time availability and enrollment status.

lms.title: LMS integration
lms.description: Integrate AACsearch with Moodle, Canvas, Blackboard, and other LMS platforms. Search across course content, discussions, and resources.

solutionsHealthcarePage.title: Search for Healthcare
solutionsHealthcarePage.description: HIPAA-ready search architecture for patient portals, clinical tools, and health information systems.

solutionsHealthcare.title: Clinical search, built responsibly
solutionsHealthcare.subtitle: AACsearch gives healthcare teams fast, accurate search with the access controls and data segregation patient privacy requires.

clinicalTerms.title: Clinical terminology
clinicalTerms.description: Synonym libraries for ICD-10 codes, drug names, and medical conditions. Supports lay and clinical terminology in the same index.

hipaaReady.title: HIPAA-aligned architecture
hipaaReady.description: Tenant isolation, scoped access tokens, and no PII logging in search analytics. Infrastructure configured for HIPAA workloads.

auditLog.title: Audit trail
auditLog.description: Every query, every result click, and every admin action logged with timestamp and user context for compliance review.

tenantIsolation.title: Patient data isolation
tenantIsolation.description: Search tokens are org-scoped and HMAC-signed. Patients, practitioners, and admins each get a different access level at the token level.

realTimeUpdates.title: Real-time record updates
realTimeUpdates.description: Clinical records and pharmacy data indexed in under a second. Formulary changes appear immediately without full reindex.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language support
multiLanguage.description: Patient-facing search in the user's preferred language. Language detection and locale-aware search widget.

clinical.title: Clinical data search
clinical.description: Search clinical data across patient records, lab results, and medical histories. Support for structured and unstructured clinical notes.

hipaa.title: HIPAA compliance
hipaa.description: AACsearch is built with HIPAA compliance in mind. Data encryption at rest and in transit, access controls, and audit logging included.

medicalCoding.title: Medical code search
medicalCoding.description: Search ICD-10, CPT, and SNOMED codes with typo-tolerant and semantic search. Find the right code faster for billing and clinical documentation.

multilingual.title: Multilingual healthcare
multilingual.description: Support search across multiple languages for healthcare providers serving diverse patient populations. Language-aware stemming per query.

patient.title: Patient portal search
patient.description: Power patient portal search for appointments, medications, test results, and provider directories. Scoped tokens ensure patients only see their own data.

medical.title: Medical search
medical.description: Search medical literature, drug databases, treatment guidelines, and clinical trial data. Semantic search powered by RAG.

solutionsGamingPage.title: Search for Gaming Platforms
solutionsGamingPage.description: Player profiles, item catalogues, and marketplace listings — searched at sub-50ms latency across millions of records.

solutionsGaming.title: Search as fast as your game
solutionsGaming.subtitle: Real-time item updates, geo-matched player search, and in-game marketplace listings — all indexed within seconds of an event.

itemSearch.title: Item & loot search
itemSearch.description: Search across millions of items by rarity, type, stats, and price. Filters and sort orders update in real time as the market moves.

playerSearch.title: Player profile search
playerSearch.description: Find players by username, rank, region, and playstyle. Supports prefix matching for autocomplete in lobby screens.

geoSearch.title: Geo-matched search
geoSearch.description: Surface players and servers within a configurable distance. Radius and bounding-box geo queries supported out of the box.

realTimeSync.title: Real-time event sync
realTimeSync.description: Index updates triggered by game events — item drops, rank changes, marketplace listings — arrive in under a second.

multiSearch.title: Multi-index queries
multiSearch.description: Run a single request across items, players, and guilds simultaneously. One round-trip, merged results, minimal latency.

analytics.title: Game analytics
analytics.description: See what players search for, which queries hit dead ends, and how search drives marketplace conversions.

highConcurrency.title: High concurrency
highConcurrency.description: Handle thousands of concurrent search queries during peak gaming hours. AACsearch maintains sub-50ms latency under heavy load.

items.title: Item and inventory search
items.description: Search player inventories, item catalogs, and marketplaces. Filter by item type, rarity, stats, level requirement, and price range.

players.title: Player search
players.description: Search players by username, guild, level, rank, achievement score, and region. Power in-game social features and admin tools.

realtime.title: Real-time updates
realtime.description: Index updates propagate in real time as player data changes. New items, leaderboard positions, and player stats appear in search results immediately.

widget.title: In-game search widget
widget.description: Embed AACsearch widget inside game UIs. Player-facing search for items, guilds, players, and leaderboards with game-themed styling.

wiki.title: Game wiki search
wiki.description: Search game wikis, guides, patch notes, and community content. Find the right guide, build, or strategy in seconds.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard search
leaderboard.description: Search and filter leaderboards by player name, rank, score, guild, and region. Real-time updates as player stats change.

store.title: In-game store search
store.description: Power in-game item store search. Search skins, weapons, characters, and bundles by name, type, rarity, and price range.
